overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man game showing the character walking through a detailed New York City street environment on a clear autumn day. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes various urban elements including food carts, subway entrances, and street murals while pedestrians and vehicles populate the streets.

events.description: Spider-Man steps onto crosswalk and crosses the street intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the sidewalk, navigating through pedestrians and approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: food cart with distinctive blue and yellow umbrella serving hot dogs and pretzels
modern multi-story office building with horizontal stripes
red brick residential building with stone steps and black railings

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a sunlit city sidewalk lined with autumn trees. A food cart with a blue and yellow umbrella appears on the left as pedestrians pass by. The character approaches and crosses a street intersection with a yellow taxi visible on the road.

events.description: passing green subway entrance with metal railings and advertising billboard

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the subway entrance and various pedestrians

entered.detail: subway entrance with distinctive green metal railings and stairs leading underground
large billboard with 'OUR' text and portrait advertisement above the subway
pile of black garbage bags and cardboard boxes on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, Spider-Man continues along a new block featuring a green subway entrance with advertising billboards. Trash bags line the right side of the sidewalk as various pedestrians walk past in the autumn sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with ornate historic building

events.description: crossing the street at the W 14th St intersection with traffic light
approaching building with elaborate stone entrance and gold lion sculpture

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and continuing along the sidewalk past the ornate building entrance

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab parked at the curb in front of the ornate building

yellow taxi cab parked at the curb with checkered pattern on side
bicycle rack with several bikes parked in front of the building

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses a wide intersection at W 14th Street, entering an area dominated by an ornate historic building with a gold lion sculpture above the entrance. A yellow taxi is parked at the curb as pedestrians gather near the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with street art mural and alley

events.description: passing large black and white mural painted on brick wall depicting a roaring creature

agents.ego_description: walking past the mural and approaching the dark alley entrance between buildings

entered.detail: large striking black and white mural of a roaring bear or monster face with dripping paint effect on brick wall
dark narrow alley entrance between two brick buildings with stairs visible
green newspaper vending stand with 'DAILY BUGLE' signage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower sidewalk section featuring a striking black and white street art mural of a roaring creature on a brick wall. Spider-Man walks past a Daily Bugle newspaper stand and approaches a dark alley entrance between the buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit New York City street that transitions from a bustling commercial sidewalk to a more artistic urban corridor. It begins with Spider-Man walking past autumn trees and a colorful food cart before crossing a street intersection where a yellow taxi passes. As the character continues along the next block, the environment shifts to feature a green subway entrance with advertising billboards and trash bags lining the walkway. The scene then expands across the wide intersection of W 14th Street, moving toward an ornate historic building marked by a gold lion sculpture. Finally, the camera follows the character onto a narrower sidewalk past a striking black and white creature mural and a Daily Bugle newspaper stand before approaching the mouth of a dark alley.
